findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The North Carolina state seal/emblem at the top center of the PDF letterhead is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the official North Carolina state seal image centered at the top of the page. HTML has no corresponding image element.

findings.description: The handwritten signature of David Miller is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a handwritten signature above the printed name 'David Miller, PE'. HTML only contains the printed name and title with no signature image.

findings.description: The DEQ agency logo/emblem in the footer area is missing from the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the DEQ organizational logo next to the footer contact information. HTML renders the footer text only, without the logo image.

findings.description: The PDF contains three substantive images — the North Carolina state seal at the top, David Miller's handwritten signature, and the DEQ logo at the bottom — none of which have corresponding tags in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the NC state seal (top center), a cursive signature above 'David Miller, PE', and the DEQ logo in the footer. The HTML contains zero tags for any of these.
